nodes.name: CCIS main entrance
nodes.instruction: You are at the CCIS main entrance. Cameron Library is to the right. Turn right and start walking toward Student Services.

nodes.name: Student Services corridor decision
nodes.instruction: You have passed Student Services. The corridor ends here. Turn right to continue toward Chemistry and CAB.

nodes.name: Door approaching to Chemistry link
nodes.instruction: Door approaching in about 3 to 5 meters. Continue forward to the door into the Chemistry building.

nodes.name: Enter Chemistry building
nodes.instruction: You have entered the Chemistry building. Continue straight through the hallway.

nodes.name: Chemistry halfway intersection
nodes.instruction: You are at an intersection in the Chemistry building. Continue straight toward the CAB connection.

nodes.name: Door approaching to CAB
nodes.instruction: Door approaching in about 3 to 5 meters. Continue forward to the door into the CAB building.

nodes.name: CAB building entrance and intersection
nodes.instruction: You have entered the CAB building. An intersection is ahead. Walk forward to the intersection.

nodes.name: CAB intersection turn left for Cameron
nodes.instruction: You are at the CAB intersection. Turn left to go toward Cameron Library.

nodes.name: Cameron hallway and stairs ahead
nodes.instruction: You are in the hallway toward Cameron Library. Stairs going down are ahead. Walk carefully and prepare to go down the stairs.

nodes.name: Cameron Library main desk
nodes.instruction: You have entered Cameron Library. Continue forward to the main desk. You have reached your destination.
